recommended_feature_backbone: local OpenAI CLIP ViT-B/32 if cached; fallback STWM crop stats only if CLIP unavailable
stage2_train_samples_have_future_object_: yes: Stage2SemanticDataset exposes fut_state/fut_valid and entity_boxes_over_time; mask availability depends on source dataset and predecode/raw mask paths.
target_leakage_risk: low if future GT crops are used only as supervised targets and never inserted into observed input/rollout hidden; trainer and cache report must carry no_future_candidate_leakage=true.
